evals.prompt: Can you analyze my trading database and give me a full report on how the bot has been performing? I want to see the regime breakdown, signal counts, and recent trades for both BTC and ETH.
evals.expected_output: A structured per-symbol report covering data coverage, regime distribution table, signal breakdown table, volume spike rate, last 5 BUY/SELL signals table, and last-24h breakdown. Followed by a summary paragraph.

evals.prompt: How many buy and sell signals has my bot generated? And what percentage of time is it in RANGING vs TRENDING mode?
evals.expected_output: Signal counts (BUY/SELL/HOLD) and regime distribution (RANGING vs TRENDING with percentages) for each symbol. Should handle empty DB gracefully if no data exists.
